{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves studying the electrochemical behavior of Au10Ag90 alloy using various techniques such as chemical dealloying and electrochemical dealloying. The goal is to understand the differences in the current-voltage (I-V) curves obtained from these methods.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A scientist in a laboratory setting prepares samples labeled 'Au10 Ag90 Alloy' for electrochemical analysis.",
    "The scientist uses a balance to measure the mass of the samples.",
    "The scientist then places the samples into a heating chamber set at 7900°C.",
    "Afterward, the scientist uses a syringe to inject a solution into a test tube containing the alloy sample.",
    "The scientist records data from an oscilloscope showing the I-V curve for the alloy."
  ],
